*   *trial* seems very fitting, it's a quintessential court activity.
*   *serve* could work as it is used in both tennis and the serving of legal papers.
*   *order* is a direct product of the court.
*   *brief* is a common product of the court, but is more niche.

The most obvious and straightforward answer has to be *trial*. A trial is the main event of a court. So, my first guess will be *trial*.
